shape_decode: cmp=L, vp=W, vpc=W, naive=W -> cmplog BLOCKS; value_profile + value_profile_cmplog + naive RESOLVE. Mixed shape: each branch carries an i2s-ANTI claim (_h0: naive>cmplog, I2S hurts) AND a vp-PRO claim (_h1: vpc>cmplog, CMP_MAP gradient rescues). Each hypothesis is assigned by its named mechanism+direction, not by the shape label.
round_note: Loop-until-dry ROUND 3 (FINAL) re-design. SUPERSET of round 2 (preserved at evidence_test.r2.json; r1 at evidence_test.r1.json; r0 at evidence_test.r0.json). The 8 CONFIRMED branches' hypotheses are KEPT verbatim. The 3 STILL-UNLABELED branches (libpng/3974, harfbuzz/5977, harfbuzz/5998) survived all prior rounds: depth_reach (r1) refuted for 5977/5998; value_distance_reached (r1) refuted for libpng/3974; joint_necessity struct_size_and_token_count (r2) refuted for 5977/5998. Round 3 may NOT re-propose any prior rule, even relaxed. ONE genuinely-new tool remains untried and FITS exactly one of the three: token_count (exact-literal-presence in winner-vs-loser seeds) discriminates harfbuzz/5977 because its cards name CONCRETE readable OpenType tag substrings ('srch','jy-hant','an-hant','nt-hk') present in naive's resolving seeds and (hypothesized) overwritten by I2S in cmplog's blocking seeds. harfbuzz/5998 names NO concrete literal (presence_or_nonnull halant glyph-category, 'no exact magic-value match'), so token_count cannot fit; the only other untried tool corpus_size_ratio is branch-INDEPENDENT (identical cmplog-vs-naive numbers for every harfbuzz branch) and therefore cannot positively confirm 5998's branch-SPECIFIC structural-halant mechanism (G1 fail) -> 5998 is honestly decidable:false. libpng/3974 remains decidable:false (derived overflow sentinel, no input pre-image; raw-havoc throughput; no built tool measures either).

hypotheses.label: I2S RandReplace overwrites the exact structural/category/literal bytes naive havoc assembles, depleting (not enriching) the target byte in cmplog's corpus relative to naive

params.note: harfbuzz on-disk corpus available; these branches expose a fixed-ish offset structural/category byte (Halant H bytes, VPre record bytes, the repeated-record stride) that I2S substitution displaces.

hypotheses.prediction: If I2S is ACTIVELY CORRUPTING the structural byte, cmplog's corpus is byte-DEPLETED at the target offset vs naive => signed_target_enrich < 0 (anti). An I2S-IRRELEVANT gate (the no-preimage class) returns no_gate_signature; a pro-I2S gate returns > 0. A clearly NEGATIVE enrichment discriminates active corruption from mere irrelevance.
hypotheses.g1_alternative_ruled_out: Rules out 'I2S has no traction' (no_gate_signature) and 'I2S helps' (positive enrich): only ACTIVE depletion of the structural byte in the cmplog corpus produces signed_target_enrich < -0.3.
hypotheses.g2_independence: operand_enrichment compares cmplog-vs-naive corpus byte frequency, never the vp/vpc resolve signal that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: Gate has no input-side CMP preimage (category-table / state-machine classification, length threshold, or internally-derived overflow sentinel); I2S substitution finds no fixed-offset value to copy, so it misallocates budget while naive havoc explores freely
hypotheses.membership_change_note: libpng_3974_h0 REMOVED vs round 1 (kept removed): its i2s-anti mechanism per the card is RAW HAVOC THROUGHPUT, which operand_enrichment's no_gate_signature outcome does NOT positively confirm; libpng_3974 is in decidable_false.

params.note: operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature on structural/length gates and on gates with no fixed-offset value operand.

hypotheses.prediction: These gates have NO fixed-offset input-byte value to substitute (category-table dispatch, syllable-length threshold start+3<=end). operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature. A genuine fixed-offset value gate would instead return a definite signed_target_enrich; so 'no_gate_signature' positively discriminates the no-preimage class from byte-corruption.
hypotheses.g1_alternative_ruled_out: Distinguishes the no-input-preimage class (no fixed-offset operand => no_gate_signature) from the active-corruption class (a real target byte => a numeric signed enrich). If the tool DID find a target offset and return a number, this hypothesis is REFUTED for that branch.
hypotheses.g2_independence: Corpus-byte-frequency measurement, independent of the vp/vpc resolve pattern.

hypotheses.label: VP CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient gives graded partial-progress feedback toward the gate comparand, letting value_profile/vpc retain near-miss inputs that approach the target while cmplog's edge-only binary feedback stalls

params.note: Comparands: category/codepoint equality states (harfbuzz indic/myanmar/USE category gates, 0x0D12 MALAYALAM codepoint).

hypotheses.prediction: If VP's gradient is the rescue mechanism, value_profile's corpus REACHES strictly closer to the gate comparand than cmplog's (vp_min_distance < cmp_min_distance, winner_closer=true) while cmplog plateaus far from the target. If both reached equal distance, the rescue is NOT gradient-driven (refuted).
hypotheses.g1_alternative_ruled_out: Rules out 'value_profile resolves for a non-gradient reason' (e.g. raw throughput): under that alternative vp and cmplog reach equal value-distance and distance_gap ~ 0. A gradient rescue REQUIRES vp to approach measurably closer.
hypotheses.g2_independence: Measures corpus value-distance to the comparand, NOT the vpc-resolves flag that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: For the harfbuzz USE-shaper structural-assembly gates (5977 ZWNJ-plus-following-non-ignorable loop-exit; 5998 halant-bearing reorder syllable), the gate is reached only by a buffer carrying intact, readable script/language TAG substrings that map to real USE glyph categories. cmplog's I2SRandReplace overwrites those readable tag bytes with CMP-buffer operands, so its blocking corpus is token-content-starved relative to naive's resolving corpus, measured as a deficit in structural-token COUNT and tag-bearing seed SIZE (joint_necessity), NOT a fixed-offset byte depletion and NOT a per-seed branch iteration-depth.

params.note: joint_necessity reports median seed size + structural-token count for resolving vs blocking seed sets; contrast = naive-resolving vs cmplog-blocking (i2s-anti). harfbuzz on-disk corpus + cov available on s4.
params.tokens: srch, jy-hant, an-hant, nt-hk (4-byte ASCII OpenType-style tag runs); generally readable [a-z-]{3,7} tag substrings that decode to real USE glyph categories.

hypotheses.prediction: If I2S is starving the structural-token content, cmplog's BLOCKING seeds carry materially FEWER readable tag tokens than naive's RESOLVING seeds (cmp_tags depressed) AND the resolving tag-bearing buffers are larger (size_lift >= 1.3).
hypotheses.g1_alternative_ruled_out: Rules out 'cmplog assembles the same tag structure but loses for a value/throughput reason' (cmp_tags ~ resolving set, size_lift ~ 1, rule fails).
hypotheses.g2_independence: joint_necessity measures the structural-token count + median size of the SEED SETS (a content property of the corpus), not the cmp=L/naive=W resolve flags that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: For the same harfbuzz USE structural-assembly gates (5977/5998), value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient rewards partial progress toward the byte patterns selecting the ZWNJ-plus-non-ignorable / halant glyph categories, so the vpc-resolving corpus accretes MORE structural-token (tag-derived) content than cmplog's blocking corpus (joint_necessity token/size lift).

params.note: joint_necessity's vpc_tags (vpc-RESOLVING seeds) vs cmp_tags (cmplog-BLOCKING seeds); tag_lift = vpc/cmp token ratio. harfbuzz on-disk corpus available on s4.
params.tokens: Same USE/OpenType tag substrings: srch, jy-hant, an-hant, nt-hk and readable [a-z-]{3,7} tag runs.

hypotheses.prediction: If VP's gradient accretes the structural-token content, vpc's resolving seeds carry MORE tag tokens than cmplog's blocking seeds: vpc_tags > cmp_tags, tag_lift >= 1.3 (and size_lift >= 1.3).
hypotheses.g1_alternative_ruled_out: Rules out 'vpc carries the same structural-token content as cmplog but resolves for a non-gradient reason' (tag_lift ~ 1, rule fails).
hypotheses.g2_independence: joint_necessity measures structural-token content + size of the seed sets, not the vpc-RESOLVES flag that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: For harfbuzz/5977 (USE find_syllables loop-exit gated by a ZWNJ-plus-following-non-ignorable glyph structure), naive's resolving seeds carry an INTACT, concrete, human-readable OpenType script/language tag literal (e.g. 'jy-hant' / 'srch' / 'an-hant' / 'nt-hk') that the USE shaper maps to a real glyph category; cmplog's I2SRandReplace continually overwrites those exact tag bytes with CMP-buffer operands, so the literal is PRESENT in naive's resolving seeds but DEPLETED/ERASED in cmplog's blocking seeds -- an I2S-anti effect visible as exact-literal presence (token_count's literal_presence_ratio), distinct from the refuted iteration-DEPTH (depth_reach) and token-SET-count (joint_necessity) signals.
hypotheses.novelty_basis: GENUINELY new mechanism-SIGNAL and a previously-untried built tool (token_count) for harfbuzz/5977. Distinct from every prior test on this branch: (a) depth_reach (r1) asked how DEEP the branch line iterates per seed -- refuted; (b) joint_necessity (r2) counted a structural-token SET over MEDIAN seed size (cmp_tags/size_lift) -- refuted; (c) THIS measures the mean PER-SEED COUNT of ONE concrete readable tag literal and its loser/winner presence ratio. The cards explicitly name these literals as the intact substrings in naive's winning seeds ('srch' at offset 0x1d, 'jy-hant'/'an-hant', 'nt-hk') and name cmplog's blocking seeds as repeated CMP-derived runs that lack them -- exactly the present-in-winner/erased-in-loser signature token_count was built to test. It is NOT a relaxed-threshold re-run of any prior rule (different tool, different metric, different falsification condition).

params.note: token_count reads on-disk resolving (naive) vs blocking (cmplog) seeds and reports the mean per-seed count of the exact literal plus literal_presence_ratio = (loser_count + 0.5)/(winner_count + 0.5). harfbuzz corpus on s4. Primary literal 'jy-hant' (a 7-char readable tag the card cites as carried by naive's resolving seeds and absent from cmplog's CMP-run blocking seeds); 'srch','an-hant','nt-hk' are the alternate tag carriers from the same structural-token vocabulary. Built tool not yet tried on this shape.

hypotheses.prediction: If I2S erases the readable tag literal, the literal is PRESENT in naive's resolving seeds (winner_literal_count >= 1) but DEPLETED in cmplog's blocking seeds (literal_presence_ratio < 0.34). If cmplog's blocking seeds carried the literal at comparable density (literal_presence_ratio ~ 1) the I2S-erasure story is REFUTED -- cmplog kept the tag and stalled for another reason; if naive's seeds also lack the literal (winner_literal_count < 1) the literal is not the structural carrier and the hypothesis is REFUTED.
hypotheses.g1_alternative_ruled_out: Rules out the obvious alternative 'the readable tag is incidental, equally present in both arms' (literal_presence_ratio ~ 1, rule fails). Only an actual present-in-winner/erased-in-loser pattern -- the I2S over-substitution signature -- confirms it. Distinct from byte_corruption (fixed-offset frequency), no_preimage (no_gate_signature residue), and the refuted depth (iteration count) / token-set (joint_necessity) tests.
hypotheses.g2_independence: token_count reads the exact-literal byte content of the resolving vs blocking SEED SETS, never the naive=W/cmp=L resolve flags that defined the shape. The shape says naive resolves; this asks WHETHER the resolving seeds carry, and the blocking seeds lack, the concrete tag literal -- an independent content question.

decision_order_rationale: Per branch, the _h0 (i2s-anti) and _h1 (vp-pro) axes are INDEPENDENT and BOTH may confirm. i2s-anti axis order: (1) byte_corruption (definite negative enrich at a fixed offset); (2) readable_tag_literal_erasure (exact-literal presence/erasure via token_count, NEW r3, only harfbuzz_5977_h0 which has a concrete tag literal); (3) structural_token_content_starvation (token-SET count + size deficit, joint_necessity, KEEP); (4) no_preimage (no_gate_signature residue). vp-pro axis: (5) cmpmap_gradient_rescue (category/codepoint comparands via value_distance_reached, KEEP); (6) structural_token_content_climb (token-SET lift via joint_necessity, KEEP). A branch can be confirmed on one axis, both, or neither; unconfirmed-on-both falls to fallback=inconclusive. libpng_3974 (both halves) and harfbuzz_5998 (both halves) are decidable:false -- see decidable_false.
data_realities_respected: I2S is untagged in mutation_op: NO seed_lineage 'I2S event' descriptor proposed. The NEW token_count test reads exact-literal byte content of resolving-vs-blocking SEED SETS (a corpus content property), not a lineage event.

value_profile is a FEEDBACK not a mutator: the vp-pro hypotheses measure what the corpus REACHES/CONTAINS (value_distance_reached Hamming-closure; joint_necessity token content), never a lineage gradient event.

Structural-assembly gates have different-SIZED W/L seeds so byte-alignment (byte_freq_ratio) fails for 5977/5998: token_count (per-seed literal count, scale-free) and joint_necessity (struct_size_and_token_count) are the data_realities-sanctioned alternatives for different-sized seeds.

On-disk corpora + cov images: harfbuzz is on s4 (corpus + libafl-harfbuzz-cov) -> harfbuzz_5977 token_count scorable on s4. libpng_3974 corpus is on sB; it is decidable:false for a TOOL-COVERAGE reason (no descriptor fits its derived-sentinel/throughput mechanism), NOT corpus-absence -- it would be decidable:false on owning server sB too.

token_count / joint_necessity tokens are target-specific: the harfbuzz OpenType tag substrings (jy-hant/srch/an-hant/nt-hk; readable [a-z-]{3,7}) are supplied as the literal/structural-token vocabulary, matching the registry scope (font tags for harfbuzz).

decidable_false.rationale: TWO branches are honestly NON-DISCRIMINABLE by any built or buildable descriptor after all prior rounds, so they stay inconclusive (G3). (1) libpng_3974 (unchanged from r2): _h0 i2s-anti mechanism is RAW HAVOC THROUGHPUT (more execs/sec, no built tool measures throughput; operand_enrichment's no_gate_signature is non-discriminating across every operand-absent gate); _h1 vp-pro comparand 0x7fffffff is a DERIVED OVERFLOW SENTINEL with NO input-byte pre-image, so value_distance_reached's Hamming-closure over input bytes is structurally meaningless (which is why its r1 value_distance_reached test did not hold). No built descriptor climbs distance to a value the input never literally contains, and on sB the same tool-coverage gap holds. (2) harfbuzz_5998 (NEW this round to decidable_false): its gate is presence_or_nonnull on the halant glyph-category with NO concrete literal/magic value ('no exact magic-value match against any program constant gates this'). It has now been REFUTED on depth_reach (r1, iteration depth) and joint_necessity (r2, structural-token SET count + size). The ONLY remaining untried tool, corpus_size_ratio, is BRANCH-INDEPENDENT (it compares whole cmplog-vs-naive saved corpora, yielding identical numbers for every harfbuzz branch of this arm-pair) -- so it cannot positively confirm 5998's branch-SPECIFIC halant-glyph-category mechanism over any other harfbuzz branch (G1: it does not discriminate this branch's mechanism from the shared corpus-scale effect). token_count does not fit because there is no concrete literal to count. With no remaining per-branch discriminable signal, marking 5998 decidable:false is the CORRECT outcome rather than forcing a relabel onto a branch-independent corpus statistic. Both fall to fallback=inconclusive.

notes.priors_kept: All KEEP hypotheses retained verbatim as a superset so the 8 confirmed branches re-validate and the rule-set is monotonic: i2s_anti_structural_byte_corruption, i2s_anti_no_input_preimage_misdirection, vp_pro_cmpmap_gradient_rescue (the three from r0/r1), plus the two r2 joint_necessity hypotheses i2s_anti_structural_token_content_starvation and vp_pro_structural_token_content_climb (carried unchanged per the superset rule, though they did not hold for 5977/5998 in r2). No prior refuted rule (depth_reach r1; value_distance_reached r1 on 0x7fffffff; the joint_necessity r2 thresholds) is re-proposed, even relaxed.
notes.new_mechanisms: ONE new hypothesis: i2s_anti_readable_tag_literal_erasure for harfbuzz_5977_h0, over the BUILT but previously-untried token_count tool. It claims the concrete readable OpenType tag literal ('jy-hant'/'srch'/etc.) is present in naive's resolving seeds but erased by I2S in cmplog's blocking seeds (winner_literal_count >= 1 AND literal_presence_ratio < 0.34) -- a genuinely different signal (exact-literal presence/erasure) than the refuted iteration-DEPTH (depth_reach) and token-SET-count (joint_necessity) tests. It fits 5977 because its cards name a concrete literal; it does NOT fit 5998 (no concrete literal).
notes.decidable_false: TWO branches honestly decidable:false. libpng_3974 (both halves) for tool-coverage: raw-havoc throughput (no throughput tool) and a derived overflow sentinel with no input pre-image (value_distance_reached cannot climb to a non-present value). harfbuzz_5998 (both halves) NEW this round: no concrete literal (token_count cannot fit), already refuted on depth_reach and joint_necessity, and the last untried tool (corpus_size_ratio) is branch-independent so cannot discriminate its branch-specific halant mechanism (G1 fail). Per the cross-server rule neither mark is corpus-absence; both would be decidable:false on their owning server. Both fall to fallback=inconclusive.
notes.why_round2_failed_for_5977_5998: r2 used joint_necessity (structural-token SET count + median seed size); arbitration scored the rules but none held. For 5977 we now hypothesize the deficit is visible as exact readable-tag-LITERAL presence/erasure (token_count) rather than as an aggregate token-set count, and add that discriminating test. For 5998 there is no concrete literal and no remaining discriminable per-branch signal, so it is decidable:false.
notes.tools_used: operand_enrichment (2 kept i2s-anti hyps), value_distance_reached (1 kept vp-pro hyp), joint_necessity (2 kept structural-token hyps), token_count (1 NEW i2s-anti exact-literal hyp for 5977). corpus_size_ratio was considered and rejected for 5998 (branch-independent => non-discriminating). No unbuilt tool referenced.
notes.targets: 8 confirmed + harfbuzz_5977 (new token_count test) all on harfbuzz (s4: corpus + cov image). harfbuzz_5998 and libpng_3974 are decidable:false for tool-coverage, independent of server.
